description: Get fabric softener when washing machine finishes

cues.visual: Purple bottle with lavender flower label

element2.creation_context: Dinner napkins are in the washing machine

element3.detected_activity_raw: User is arranging cutlery on the dining table

encoding_info.encoding_text: The dinner napkins are in the washing machine. When it finishes, go to the bathroom and get the fabric softener from the shelf above the machine — the purple bottle with the lavender label. Add it to the dryer cycle.

distractor_info.distractor_description: Purple bottle with eucalyptus label, same shelf
